ground_truth.photographer_description: A photo from Bali, more specifically Dream Sea Hotel. You can see some small buildings and the ocean. It's the Padang Padang Beach. Would be impressive to get without metadata, but at least a tropical island. Clear skies, daytime.

details.description: A tropical coastal cove on Bali’s Bukit Peninsula with clear turquoise water, a pocket of sandy beach, and scattered limestone sea stacks topped with small shrubs. On the left, several cliff‑hugging buildings and cafe terraces with timber and alang‑alang thatched roofs step down the limestone bluff. Beyond the shallow lagoon, a fringing reef creates gentle peeling waves where several surfers are waiting in the lineup. The coastline curves to a vegetated headland in the distance. The scene is sunlit under a mostly clear sky with a few cumulus clouds.

details.description: An elevated coastal view in Pecatu, Bali, Indonesia, showing a calm turquoise bay with shallow clear water and exposed limestone rocks. Left side features a row of cliffside buildings with thatched roofs and balconies, some with white patio umbrellas, perched directly above a small beach. A sandy cove runs along the lower edge, with green tropical trees on the cliff. The sea gradually deepens toward the horizon. The sky is bright with scattered white cumulus clouds, suggesting midday sun.

details.description: Tropical coastline with a small sandy cove framed by limestone cliffs and scattered rock stacks topped with low shrubs. Turquoise, clear water laps the shore while gentle reef waves break farther out with several surfers visible. On the left, a cluster of cliffside houses/cafes is perched above the water. A green headland extends into the sea under a bright midday sky with puffy clouds. The scene strongly matches Padang Padang (Labuan Sait) Beach on the Bukit Peninsula in Pecatu, Bali.

details.description: A coastal Balinese scene viewed from above: a narrow sandy beach curves along the lower left, with turquoise, shallow water and several dark rock outcrops rising from the sea. To the left, a cliffside hillside is dotted with multi-story buildings and thatched-roof terraces, likely resort villas, perched along the slope and partially shaded by trees. The water transitions from light aqua near the shore to deeper blue toward the horizon, and a bright blue sky with fluffy white clouds dominates the upper portion of the image. The overall impression is a cliffside resort area along Bali's Pecatu/Uluwatu coastline with a calm, picturesque bay.

details.description: A vertical, high-angle shot capturing a scenic tropical coastline, likely in Bali. The foreground features a sandy beach cove on the bottom left, bordered by rugged, dark limestone cliffs. Nestled into the cliffside on the left are several multi-story buildings featuring traditional thatched roofs (alang-alang) and white facades, characteristic of Balinese architecture, with terraces overlooking the sea. The ocean water is a vibrant gradient of clear turquoise in the shallows to deep blue further out. Scattered throughout the nearshore waters are large, dark rock formations, including a prominent, isolated sea stack on the right side topped with lush green vegetation. In the background, the coastline curves gently, covered in dense greenery. The sky is a bright blue, dominated by a large, fluffy white cumulus cloud. Small figures, likely surfers, can be seen in the distance where the waves break.

details.description: A high-angle vertical shot of a tropical coastline featuring turquoise waters and limestone cliffs. Several buildings with traditional Balinese thatched roofs (alang-alang) and modern white structures are built directly into the cliffside overlooking the ocean. Large, dark rock formations, some topped with green vegetation, are scattered in the shallow water near a small sandy beach. In the distance, more cliffs covered in lush green foliage extend into the sea. The water is clear, showing submerged rocks, and small waves are breaking further out where surfers can be seen. The sky is bright blue with a large, fluffy white cloud. The lighting is bright and sunny, typical of midday.

details.description: Cliff-backed tropical beach with clear turquoise water and scattered limestone sea stacks topped with small shrubs. At the left, multi‑level cliffside guesthouses/cafes with thatched and timber elements cling to the rock, with small terraces and umbrellas overlooking a narrow sandy cove below. Farther out, gentle reef breaks form parallel lines where surfers are waiting, and the coastline curves to a green headland. The scene is sunlit under a mostly clear sky with a single large cloud.

details.description: A tropical coastal scene featuring a cliffside village with white-washed buildings and balconies perched along the edge. Many structures have thatched roofs and appear to extend over rocky terraces above a clear, turquoise shoreline. Large rock outcrops rise from the shallow, emerald-green water near a sandy beach. Lush green foliage covers the cliff, and the sky is bright blue with fluffy white clouds. The calm sea licks the shore while a few swimmers or surfers are visible in the water, and distant headlands curve along the horizon.

details.description: Bright tropical coastal scene overlooking a small sandy cove with turquoise water. Large limestone boulders sit in the shallows, some topped with scrubby trees. On the left, multi‑level cliffside houses/cafés with thatched roofs and balconies cling to the greenery-covered rock face. A few swimmers wade in the protected shallows while surfers wait farther out on a reef break; a red warning flag marks the swimming area. In the distance a lush headland projects into the calm sea. The sky is clear blue with big cumulus clouds and strong midday sunlight.

details.description: A vertical, high-angle shot capturing a vibrant tropical coastal scene, identified as Padang Padang Beach (Pantai Labuan Sait) in Bali. The foreground features a section of sandy beach at the bottom left and turquoise, translucent water revealing submerged rocks. A prominent, dark limestone sea stack topped with lush green vegetation sits isolated in the water to the right. On the left, the steep cliffside is developed with tiered architecture, including multi-story buildings with balconies and a distinctive structure featuring a traditional thatched roof and white walls, likely a resort or beach club. The background shows a lush, green headland extending into the Indian Ocean, with surfers visible as small dots in the distance. The sky is bright blue with large, fluffy white cumulus clouds.

details.description: A high-angle vertical shot of a tropical coastline featuring turquoise waters and a white sandy beach. On the left, several multi-story buildings with traditional Balinese thatched roofs (Alang-alang) are built directly into the limestone cliffside. Large, dark limestone rocks are scattered along the shoreline and in the shallow water, some topped with green shrubs. One prominent rock in the water features a small red and white flag. In the distance, the coastline continues with lush green cliffs. The sky is bright blue with a large, prominent white cloud. Several people can be seen swimming and surfing in the ocean.
